children.name: hwL2mcCacSourceAddress
children.description: This object indicates the source IP address denied by CAC.

children.name: hwL2mcCacCeVid
children.description: This object indicates the CeVid of QinQ interface.

children.name: hwL2mcCacBandwidth
children.description: This object indicates the upper limit of the bandwidth of l2-multicast groups,in Mbits/sec.

children.name: hwL2mcCacPeVid
children.description: This object indicates the PeVid of QinQ interface.

children.name: hwL2mcCacVlanIndex
children.description: This object indicates the VLAN ID.

children.name: hwL2mcCacCount
children.description: This object indicates the upper limit of the number of l2-multicast groups.

children.name: hwL2mcTrapVlanIndex
children.description: This object indicates the VLAN ID.

children.name: hwBtvEnabled
children.description: Object which indicates whether BTV Function has been enabled for the system.

children.name: hwMgmdBrasUserAddressType
children.description: The address type of the Bras User.

children.name: hwMgmdBrasUserLimitCount
children.description: The limit number of Bras user on the board.

children.name: hwMgmdBrasNotificationSlot
children.description: The name of slot.

children.name: hwExternIpGrpInfoTable
children.description:
Table contains multicast group exit port information through 
        multicast group address.

children.name: hwMcastGrpCfgTable
children.description: Table used to config multicast group.

children.name: hwMcastGrpCfgEntry
children.description: Table entry.

children.name: hwGrpProfileNameIndex
children.description: Multicast profile name.

children.name: hwMVlanIpv6StaticFlowTable
children.description: Table which indicates Mvlan static flow group information.

children.name: hwMVlanGrpInfoTable
children.description: Table which indicates Mvlan group information.

children.name: hwMcSourceDenyTable
children.description:
Table which indicates which vlan and which port had been 
        configured as source deny.

children.name: hwMVlanEnableTable
children.description: Table which indicates which vlan had been configured as Multicast-Vlan.

children.name: hwMVlanEnableEntry
children.description: Entry for vlan which had been configured as Multicast-Vlan.

children.name: hwMVlanUserVlanTable
children.description: Table which indicates the user vlans in a MVlan.
